revision.comment: Creating template.
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Shinto2 |title = [[Shinto]] |bodyclass = hlist |image = [[File:Shinto torii vermillion.svg|right|85px]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|group1 = Practices and beliefs |list1 = * [[Kami]] * [[Kagura|Ritual dance]] * [[Misogi|Ritual purity]] * [[Polytheism]] * [[Animism]] * [[Japanese festivals]] * [[Japanese mythology|Mythology]]
|group2 = [[Shinto shrine]]s |list2 = * [[List of Shinto shrines]] * [[Ichinomiya]] * [[Twenty-Two Shrines]] * [[Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines]] * [[Association of Shinto Shrines]] * [[Shinto architecture]]
|group3 = [[List of Japanese deities#Shinto|Notable Kami]] |list3 = * [[Amaterasu]] * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume]] * [[Inari Ōkami|Inari]] * [[Izanagi]] * [[Izanami]] * [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]] * [[Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|Tsukuyomi]]
|group4 = Important literature |list4 = * ''[[Kojiki]]'' (''ca''. 711 CE) * ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'' (720 CE) * ''[[Fudoki]]'' (713–723 CE) * ''[[Shoku Nihongi]]'' (797 CE) * ''[[Kogo Shūi]]'' (807 CE) * ''[[Kujiki]]'' (807 to 936 CE) * ''[[Engishiki]]'' (927 CE)
|group5 = [[:Category:Shinto|See also]] |list5 = * [[Religion in Japan]] * [[Glossary of Shinto]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] * [[List of sacred objects in Japanese mythology|Sacred objects]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japanese Buddhism]] * [[Edo neo-Confucianism]] * [[Ko-Shintō]] * [[State Shinto]] * [[Nippon Kaigi]] * [[List of legendary creatures from Japan|Mythical creatures]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Shinto templates]] </noinclude>
